title: Blitzmeister2011´s Christmas Pack
description: A vanilla like and simple christmas resourcepack
body:
Hi guys, I made a little Christmaspack. This pack is meant to be vanilla like and simplistic.
Features are: 
- Items (Tools, Totem, Cookie, etc.)
- Rain (changed to snow)
- Gui (Hud)
- Mobs (Zombie, etc. [still in work])
- changed the color of the level number

Dont worry guys this pack isnt finished yet😊

If you put this pack into a modpack (you can do it) , but please mention it. Also please mention it, if you do content with it. Bug please dont republisch it.
Thank you.

Thank you all for 200 downloads🙃
